metadata.label: conf/Clarivate-NLP
metadata.title: Senior Data Scientist (NLP)
metadata.team_direction: Clarivate is seeking a Senior Data Scientist specializing in Natural Language Processing (NLP) to join their Life Sciences & Healthcare team

findings.issue: The three summary bullets are header-led noun phrases rather than verb-led bullets, so they do not meet the strict bullet-initial action framing rule.
findings.fix: Rewrite each summary bullet so the text after the bold label starts with a strong action phrase, while keeping the required 3-sentence structure.

findings.issue: The lead frames the candidate as a "candidate" with "transferable" experience before establishing a direct NLP/ML role identity, which weakens the first-screen hook.
findings.fix: Open with a direct role anchor such as NLP-focused data scientist or senior ML/NLP practitioner, then attach the strongest measurable NLP/RAG result.

findings.issue: LangChain and LangGraph are core JD signals, but the resume has no direct Lang-based toolkit evidence in Skills or bullets.
findings.fix: Add one concrete bullet in the most relevant NLP/RAG project showing actual LangChain or LangGraph use, chain/graph ownership, or retriever orchestration; if that did not happen, this JD is not a clean match.

findings.issue: The visible timeline supports roughly 3+ years of relevant work, while the JD requires 5+ years of hands-on NLP and 5+ years of Python experience, so the hard gate is not met on the face of the resume.
findings.fix: If there is omitted pre-2021 NLP/Python industry work, add it explicitly; otherwise retarget to a mid-level NLP/ML role instead of Senior Data Scientist (NLP).

findings.issue: This intern section is breadth-heavy: Python, Go, and Java all appear with direct usage evidence, alongside gRPC, Kafka, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, and Bedrock in one short stint, which reads like stack stuffing.
findings.fix: Collapse the section around the dominant NLP/RAG toolchain and keep only the secondary technologies that are essential to the story; move the rest into one representative project bullet.

findings.issue: The newest and most relevant experience relies on percentage lifts and latency improvements, with no Tier-1 scale or scope anchor on the lead bullets.
findings.fix: Add one concrete scale or ownership anchor if true, such as dataset size, review volume, QPS, team scope, or evaluation size; otherwise let the DiDi section carry the scale story.

findings.field: TikTok · Security / Threat Knowledge Retrieval Assistant
findings.issue: A Security-team bullet uses external Bedrock-based LLM workflows without an explicit internal, sandbox, synthetic-data, or no-user-data qualifier, so an HR reader may still worry about data-boundary compliance.
findings.fix: Add a qualifying phrase such as internal evaluation, sandbox, synthetic/redacted data, or no production/user data if that is accurate.

revision_priority: [MUST] Resolve the JD gate gap: the visible timeline does not satisfy the 5+ year NLP/Python requirement, and LangChain/LangGraph are not evidenced.
[MUST] Rewrite the Summary lead to be role-first and evidence-first, removing "candidate/transferable" framing from the first line.
[SHOULD] Reduce the TikTok intern section's stack breadth so the story reads as focused NLP/RAG work rather than multi-language stack display.
[NICE] Add an explicit internal/sandbox/no-user-data qualifier to the Security-team Bedrock bullets if that is true.
raw_json.revision_instructions: [结构性错配] 当前可见经历只支持约 3+ 年相关经验，达不到 JD 的 5 年 NLP/Python 门槛；如果还有未列出的 pre-2021 NLP/Python 工作，补进最相关经历，否则应把目标调整到中级 NLP/ML 岗位。把 Summary 第一条改成直接的角色方向 + 证据，而不是 "candidate/transferable" 叙事，并在最相关的 RAG/NLP bullet 里补 LangChain/LangGraph 或同等 Lang-based toolkit 的实际使用证据。最后收敛 TikTok 段落，保留 1-2 条主链路，减少 Python/Go/Java/Kafka/K8s/Bedrock 同屏堆栈。

[NICE] Add an explicit internal/sandbox/no-user-data qualifier to the Security-team Bedrock bullets if that is true.
